vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on Backup shadow File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/shadow-, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0000 /etc/shadow-

triage_decision.reason: The remediation only changes file permissions on a backup shadow file, which follows standard STIG hardening patterns and does not affect system boot, networking, or critical services. The risk of lockout is minimal because the primary /etc/shadow file is untouched.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; filesystems affected; Insecure permissions on backup shadow file could expose password hashes; Incorrect chmod syntax could leave the file overly permissive
